name.description: The full name of the employee.

department.description: The department the employee belongs to.

createdAt.description: When the employee record was created.

createdBy.description: The UID of the manager who added this employee.

creatorName.description: The name of the manager who added this employee.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A record of a conversation with an employee regarding overbreaks.

employeeName.description: The name of the employee (denormalized for easy display).

employeeCreatorName.description: The name of the manager who added this employee.

date.description: The date and time of the conversation.

createdBy.description: The UID of the manager who recorded this conversation.

creatorName.description: The name of the manager who recorded this conversation.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

isVerified.description: Whether the user is verified by an admin.

password.description: The user's password (for mock auth fallback).

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and roles.
